name: @gordo-labs/react-native-iroh
description: Generic React Native TurboModule bridge for Iroh endpoints and framed streams
author: Gordo Labs

scripts.test:source: npm run test:js && npm run check:generic && npm run check:generated-format
scripts.test:package: npm run test:source && npm run check:release-artifacts && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.ubrn:android: node scripts/with-native-build-env.mjs --android ubrn build android --release --config ubrn.config.yaml --and-generate && node scripts/patch-ubrn-cmake.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-js.mjs && npm run format:generated
scripts.ubrn:ios: IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=13.0 node scripts/with-native-build-env.mjs ubrn build ios --release --config ubrn.config.yaml --and-generate && node scripts/patch-ubrn-ios.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-cmake.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-js.mjs && npm run format:generated
scripts.ubrn:generate: ubrn generate jsi turbo-module --config ubrn.config.yaml && node scripts/patch-ubrn-cmake.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-ios.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-js.mjs && npm run format:generated
